tweets.text:
The Trump administration has a zero-tolerance policy for illegal immigration, including:  
• Violating the terms of a visa  
• Illegal entry  
• Overstaying a visa  
• Misusing a legal status  

If you fall under one of these categories, it’s time to self-deport. By self-deporting, you can:  
• Skip the ICE arrest  
• Get a free flight home  
• Receive a $1,000 stipend

tweets.text:
Acting ICE Director Lyons' response to Broadview Mayor Thompson's letter:

"You can either continue to be part of the problem or choose to be part of the solution by directing your police to enforce local ordinances and working with us to remove violent offenders."

ICE will not be deterred from its law enforcement mission.

tweets.text:
ICE recently deported a WAR CRIMINAL and prominent rebel who commanded an all-female group of fighters during Liberia’s civil wars.  

During the conflict in her nation, Mayama Sesay was notorious for brutal tactics that terrorized and killed military personnel and civilians — often using child soldiers. 

Sesay entered the U.S. on a visitor visa. Later, she lied about her involvement with the rebel fighters during her green card interview. 

➡️Learn more in our newsroom.
tweets.text_resolved:

tweets.text:
Benjamin Madrigal-Birrueta, a Mexican national, pleaded guilty Sept. 22 to murdering a man and his pregnant wife in Washington state.  

ICE special agents led the investigation into this heinous crime.  

We appreciate the critical support from our federal, state and local law enforcement partners that helped bring this murderer to justice. 

➡️Learn more in our newsroom.

tweets.text:
Members of the Denver Special Response Team stopped to help with a 4-vehicle accident on their way to our Broadview Detention Center in Chicago, Sept. 26. 

Smoke poured out of one of the vehicles and an unconscious man, covered in blood, was trapped inside.  

Our officers rescued the man using breaching equipment because his legs were pinned. They were able to extract him just before the vehicle was engulfed in flame. They rendered aid until EMS arrived at the scene. 

ICE commends the brave actions of these officers. 

➡️See more photos in our newsroom.

tweets.text:
Joe and Michelle Abraham thank ICE Chicago officers for helping make Chicago safer by removing illegal criminal aliens from their neighborhoods. 

Their daughter Katie inspired ICE’s current “Midway Blitz” operation. She and her friend Chloe Polzin were killed in a drunk-driving hit-and-run car wreck caused by Guatemalan criminal illegal alien Julio Cucul-Bol. 

Details: https://t.co/DOJVqo3NCC

tweets.text:
CHICAGO — Operation Midway Blitz:

ICE arrested Panamanian illegal alien Alfonso Silvestre Rawlins Weatly, whose criminal history includes battery charges from May 2025. 

Cook County law enforcement arrested him on an outstanding warrant in July. At that time, we placed a detainer on him so we could pick him up at the jail, but because of Illinois' sanctuary policies, officials released him into the community instead. 

We were forced to make his arrest at-large.
tweets.text_resolved:
CHICAGO — Operation Midway Blitz:

ICE arrested Panamanian illegal alien Alfonso Silvestre Rawlins Weatly, whose criminal history includes battery charges from May 2025. 

Cook County law enforcement arrested him on an outstanding warrant in July. At that time, we placed a detainer on him so we could pick him up at the jail, but because of Illinois' sanctuary policies, officials released him into the community instead. 

We were forced to make his arrest at-large.

author.description: Protects America through criminal investigations and by enforcing immigration law to preserve national security and public safety.  https://t.co/rDI2IeFofc

tweets.text:
ICE and Dallas police have secured the scene at our Dallas field office, where a shooter opened fire on the facility this morning, firing indiscriminately at the building, including at a transport van in the sallyport. 

We can confirm that three detainees were shot while inside the van. Of the three, one has been confirmed deceased and two are in critical condition. 

The shooter is also deceased by a self-inflicted gunshot wound. 

No ICE officers were physically injured, and we are working alongside the FBI and local law enforcement on this ongoing investigation. 

This violence must stop.

➡️https://t.co/tSfSTKm0bt
tweets.text_resolved:
ICE and Dallas police have secured the scene at our Dallas field office, where a shooter opened fire on the facility this morning, firing indiscriminately at the building, including at a transport van in the sallyport. 

We can confirm that three detainees were shot while inside the van. Of the three, one has been confirmed deceased and two are in critical condition. 

The shooter is also deceased by a self-inflicted gunshot wound. 

No ICE officers were physically injured, and we are working alongside the FBI and local law enforcement on this ongoing investigation. 

This violence must stop.

➡️https://www.dhs.gov/news/2025/09/24/dhs-issues-statement-targeted-attack-dallas-ice-facility

card.name: summary_large_image
card.title: DHS Issues Statement on Targeted Attack on Dallas ICE Facility | Homeland Security
card.description: A sniper opened fire from a nearby rooftop on an ICE Dallas field office. The shooter fired indiscriminately at the ICE building, including at a van in the sallyport where victims were shot.
